passages.passage_text: Study the following information carefully to answer the questions that follow. Six couples have been invited to a dinner party. They are Niti, Geeta, Lata, Rakhi, Sita, Champa and Farookh, Hari, Amit, Tilak, Ram, Ali. They are seated on a circular table, facing each other. I. Geeta refuses to sit next to Ali. II. Lata wants to be between Amit and Hari. III. Champa refuses to sit next to Farookh. IV. Niti is seated on Ali's right hand side. V. Farookh and Tilak are seated exactly opposite to each other. VI. Ram and Sita are seated to the left of Champa. VII. Amit and Rakhi want to enjoy the company of Lata and Tilak respectively and are seated closest to them. VIII. The seating arrangement is such that minimum one woman is always between two men.

Read the following information carefully to answer the given questions. V, U and T are sitting around a circle. A, B and C are sitting around the same circle but two of them are not facing centre (they are facing the direction opposite to centre). V is second to the left of C. U is second to the right of A. B is third to the left of T. C is second to the right of T. A and C are not sitting together.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following statements is correct?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If looked in an anti-clockwise manner, who are seated between Tilak and Farookh?

choices.a: Sita, Ram, Champa, Ali and Niti
choices.b: Sita, Ram, Rakhi, Amit and Lata
choices.c: Sita, Ram, Geeta, Hari and Lata
choices.d: Sita, Ram, Lata, Amit and Hari

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following close neighbouring arrangements is correct?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is not facing centre?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is the position of T in respect of B?

choices.d: Third to the left or right

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the position of V in respect of C?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following statement is correct?

choices.a: A, B and C are sitting together
choices.b: V, U and T are sitting together
choices.c: Sitting arrangement of two persons cannot be determined
choices.d: Those who are not facing centre are sitting together
choices.e: Only two people are sitting between V and T

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the position of A in respect of U?

solutions.solution:
(d) Following sitting arrangement is formed from the given information

Brojesh
Ranjan
Promod ← → Raju
Left ← → Naveen

Clearly, Pramod is to the left of Naveen.

(c) Following sitting arrangement is formed from the given information

Asha
Chitra ← → Pankaj
Babita ← → Narendra
Right ← → Farikh

Clearly, Parikh is to the immediate right of Babita.
